initialState.content:
-- Mission 10 Guidelines
-- Use window SUM(salary) partitioned by department as dept_total
-- Compute pct_contribution = salary * 100.0 / dept_total
-- Round to 2 decimals

WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    department,
    name,
    salary,
    -- TODO dept_total window sum
  FROM employees
)
SELECT
  department,
  name,
  salary,
  dept_total,
  -- TODO percentage expression as pct_contribution
FROM base
ORDER BY department, salary DESC;

rules: must_include:sum(salary) over (partition by department) as dept_total
